title: Ickycraft
description: The vanilla+ modpack used on Ickycraft Season 3
body:
A vanilla+ modpack for Ickycraft season 3, with predominantly client-side tweaks.

_What is ickycraft?_
[Ickycraft](https://ickycraft.com/) is a vanilla+ server network with survival and creative gamemodes, setup by the [Ickycord](https://discord.gg/ickyy) staff team.
